channel.title: Military Sightings on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Military Sightings on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Pentagon Releases Batch of Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Files
item.description:
The Pentagon has released approximately 160 declassified documents concerning unidentified anomalous phenomena (UAP), including never-before-seen footage and historical materials dating back to the 1940s. These files contain reports of various UAP sightings, such as “orbs launching orbs” and a “misshapen and uneven ball of white light,” as well as accounts from Apollo crews. The release aims to provide public transparency, though the government has not claimed to have detected extraterrestrial life. Public opinion suggests a belief that the government may be concealing information about UAP, with some thinking they are alien in origin.

Source: https://www.wired.com/story/pentagon-drops-new-ufo-files

item.title: Pentagon Releases Files Related to Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP)
item.description:
The Pentagon has begun releasing government files concerning unidentified anomalous phenomena (UAP), also known as UFOs. These files include FBI reports on unexplained sightings and NASA debriefs with astronauts who observed unidentified objects on the moon. Images released alongside the files depict various phenomena, including an object seen by a U.S. military operator over the Middle East in May 2022 and a football-shaped UAP reported near Japan in 2024. Archival photographs from the Apollo 12 and Apollo 17 missions also show unidentified phenomena on the lunar surface.

Source: https://www.scientificamerican.com/article/see-the-pentagons-new-ufo-image-release
